Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Sopwith Camel
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A fast and highly maneuverable biplane fighter armed with twin synchronized machine guns. Difficult to control but deadly in experienced hands, it became one of the most successful Allied fighter aircraft of the First World War.

Being a flying vehicle, it is extremely obvious when on the move.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
